name: Basic Bread Stuffing
recipeIngredient: 1 cup (to 2 cups) Diced celery with leaves
1 tbsp Dried sage or 1/4 cup minced fresh sage
1 cup Turkey stock, water, or milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a large stockpot.
2. Add onion and celery and cook until the vegetables are tender but not browned.
3. Add the bread cubes to a large bowl.
4. Add salt, pepper, sage, and parsley; toss until well mixed.
5. Add turkey stock and blend well.
6. Use to stuff 12 to 14-pound turkey.
7. Bake leftover stuffing in a lightly greased casserole at 325°F for 45 minutes to 1 hour or until heated through.
Each serving contains about: 181 calories; 635 mg sodium; 22 g cholesterol; 9 g fat; 20 g carbohydrates; 4 g protein; 0.3 g fiber. 46% of calories from fat.
